inputs.label: Desired Molarity
inputs.businessContext: Target concentration of the electrolyte solution in moles per liter

businessContext_i18n.en: Target concentration of the electrolyte solution in moles per liter
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektrolit çözeltisinin litre başına mol cinsinden hedef konsantrasyonu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielkonzentration der Elektrolytlösung in Mol pro Liter
businessContext_i18n.fr: Concentration cible de la solution électrolytique en moles par litre
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración objetivo de la solución electrolítica en moles por litro.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التركيز المستهدف لمحلول الإلكتروليت بالمول لكل لتر.

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Final volume of the solution to prepare

businessContext_i18n.en: Final volume of the solution to prepare
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume final de la solution à préparer
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen final de la solución a preparar.

inputs.label: Solute Purity
inputs.businessContext: Purity percentage of the solid solute (e.g., 99.5 means 99.5% pure)

businessContext_i18n.en: Purity percentage of the solid solute (e.g., 99.5 means 99.5% pure)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katı çözünenin saflık yüzdesi (örneğin, 99.5, %99.5 saf anlamına gelir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Reinheitsprozentsatz des festen gelösten Stoffes (z.B. 99,5 bedeutet 99,5% rein)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de pureté du soluté solide (par exemple, 99,5 signifie 99,5 % pur)
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de pureza del soluto sólido (ej. 99.5 significa 99.5% puro).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة نقاوة المذاب الصلب (مثال: 99.5 تعني 99.5% نقاوة).

inputs.label: Molecular Weight (Anhydrous)
inputs.businessContext: Molar mass of the anhydrous solute

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar mass of the anhydrous solute

inputs.label: Water of Hydration
inputs.businessContext: Number of water molecules per formula unit (e.g., 5 for CuSO4·5H2O; 0 for anhydrous)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of water molecules per formula unit (e.g., 5 for CuSO4·5H2O; 0 for anhydrous)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Formül birimi başına su molekülü sayısı (ör. CuSO4·5H2O için 5; susuz için 0)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Wassermoleküle pro Formeleinheit (z.B. 5 für CuSO4·5H2O; 0 für wasserfrei)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de molécules d'eau par unité formulaire (ex. 5 pour CuSO4·5H2O ; 0 pour anhydre)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de moléculas de agua por unidad fórmula (ej., 5 para CuSO4·5H2O; 0 para anhidro)
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد جزيئات الماء لكل وحدة صيغة (مثال: 5 لـ CuSO4·5H2O؛ 0 للامائي).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
